title: Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple
tagline: Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Sri Raja Rajeshwara Temple is one of the most famous Hindu temples in Telangana, India, dedicated to Lord Shiva.
overview.description: Sri Raja Rajeshwara Temple is one of the most famous Hindu temples in Telangana, India, dedicated to Lord Shiva. It is located in the town of Vemulawada, Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Chinthalatana
topPlaces.description: Chinthalatana R&R Colony is a smart village located in Vemulawada Mandal, Rajanna Sircilla, Telangana, India. Chinthalatana is under the constituency of Vemulawada.

topPlaces.name: Boinpalle mandal
topPlaces.description: Boinpalle or Boinpalli is a mandal in Rajanna Sircilla district in the state of Telangana in India.

topPlaces.name: Venkatraopalle
topPlaces.description: Venkatraopalle is a municipal village in Boinpalle mandal of Karimnagar district in the state of Telangana, India. It lies exactly 18 km away from Karimnagar, located on the highway from Karimnagar to Vemulawada.

items.note: Chinthalatana R&R Colony is a smart village located in Vemulawada Mandal, Rajanna Sircilla, Telangana, India. Chinthalatana is under the constituency of Vemulawada.
Boinpalle or Boinpalli is a mandal in Rajanna Sircilla district in the state of Telangana in India.

Venkatraopalle is a municipal village in Boinpalle mandal of Karimnagar district in the state of Telangana, India. It lies exactly 18 km away from Karimnagar, located on the highway from Karimnagar to Vemulawada.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (145 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Raja Rajeshwara temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chinthalatana, Boinpalle mandal, Venkatraopalle.
